official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound transfer packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound transfer body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed transfer packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed transfer packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the transfer body.
The official ClientboundTransferPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes host as a String and port as a VarInt.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundTransferPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundTransferPacket preserves host and port for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove server transfer UX, reconnect behavior, network reconnection, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer server transfer UX, reconnect behavior, network reconnection, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
